nasb.text: Moreover, He said to me, “Son of man, take into your heart all My words which I will speak to you and listen closely.

esv.text: Moreover, he said to me, “Son of man, all my words that I shall speak to you receive in your heart, and hear with your ears.

cnv.text: 他又對我說：“人子啊！我對你說的一切話，你都要留心聽，記在心裡。

ccb.text: 祂又说：“人子啊，你要留心听我说的一切话，牢记在心。
